name: Plattsburgh Tomato Beef Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef, onion, and celery in melted butter.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf.
6. Makes 2 quarts of hearty soup.
Note: My copy, circa 1978 was given to me by Mrs. Denise Funnell, who had a copy of a Plattsburgh, NY newspaper. It was originally submitted in the paper by Mrs. Barry Wilson.
